name: tensornetwork_permutation_light_415
intent: Final-permutation-heavy tensor-network contraction diagnostic for measuring path execution without charging an extra compact-output materialization step.
notes: tenferro-trace is measured through the TensorValue output API so a terminal transpose/permutation can remain a lazy owned view; PyTorch uses opt_einsum with torch's default output semantics.
